name: table-demo
visual_summary: This is a customizable table component that allows developers to render data in a tabular format. It features sorting, pagination, and filtering capabilities. Developers can use this component to display large datasets in a clear and organized manner.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready table component with the following characteristics:

Name: table-demo
Description: This is a customizable table component that allows developers to render data in a tabular format. It features sorting, pagination, and filtering capabilities. Developers can use this component to display large datasets in a clear and organized manner.
Style: responsive, dark, customizable
Interactions: sortable, paginated, filterable
Tags: data-grid, table, pagination, sorting, filtering

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
